fields.description:
# Convergence rollout tail: Phase-3 consumer swap flip + live shadow-pass validation + capped live heal

## Summary
High-risk tail of the convergence rollout, carved from soar-quill-flare (7d23). Per epic adept-hedge-stain the
AGENT (ACLI access) performs the live validation directly, with GUARANTEED cleanup of any test artifacts in both
live Jira and the local store (comprehensive full-surface validation is centralized in sibling D1
close-ferreous-cardinal). The `.github/workflows/reconcile-bridge.yml` workflow runs `rebar reconcile --mode live`
every 20 min; the live gates below need real 20-min-apart passes (~3.5h wall clock).

## What already landed (7d23, on main)
- Phase-1 baseline dual-write SHADOW (`baseline_shadow.py`) behind `reconciler.baseline_dual_write`, with per-pass
  `baseline_shadow_check` logging + `baseline_shadow_divergence` alert.
- Circuit breaker (`check_blast_radius`, default 0.10) before the first acting mutation.
- Rollback controls + procedure documented in `docs/jira-sync-setup.md`.

## Remaining CODE
- [CODE] Phase-3 consumer swap: re-point `outbound_fields._local_matches_prev` (and its `outbound_differ` caller)
  from `prev_snapshot` to `BindingStore.get_baseline`, behind a NEW flag `reconciler.baseline_consumer_swap`
  (bool, default false; add to `ReconcilerConfig` in `_config_schema.py`, distinct from `baseline_dual_write`).
  PRESERVE byte-for-byte: absent-baseline->local-wins degrade; corrupt-store fail-closed abort; ADR 0026 #1-#3;
  `prev_snapshot` retained for L3 single-pass suppression.
- [CODE] RED-first direction-preservation property test running the SWAPPED consumer: target
  `outbound_fields._local_matches_prev` with `BindingStore.get_baseline`, covering the five mirrored fields; name
  it distinctly from the existing `test_property_direction_preservation`.
- [CODE] Census key: canonical event key is `decision_census`. `run_differs.py:535` currently emits
  `binding_walk_census` — reconcile (rename + migrate consumers, or emit both and document the canonical one).
- [CODE] classifier-vs-legacy divergence alerting (Phase-2 breadth): in `baseline_shadow.py`/`run_differs`, compare
  `classify()` decisions vs the legacy differ output and emit a `classifier_legacy_divergence` SyncLogger event
  with fields `{classifier_count, legacy_count, divergent_pairs, pass_id}`.

## Remaining OPERATIONAL (agent-run with ACLI; guaranteed cleanup)
- [OPERATIONAL] >=10 CONSECUTIVE clean live shadow passes (`baseline_shadow_check` divergent==0) BEFORE flipping
  `reconciler.baseline_consumer_swap`. Streak tracking: any pass with divergent>0 OR a gap (no log within a 20-min
  window) resets the counter to 0 and emits `baseline_shadow_divergence`; the gate is satisfied only on 10 unbroken.
- [OPERATIONAL] Capped live heal under bootstrap-strict (MODE_CAPS=10) for the known REB instances incl. the
  GC-after-grace deletion (f8b5-2f30 -> REB-530). PRE-HEAL BACKUP: export current Jira state of the affected issues
  (JSON via the Jira API) to a dated artifact; restore from it if a heal mutation misfires.
- [OPERATIONAL] Flip the consumer flag in prod only after BOTH gates; rollback rehearsed: force one `--mode dry-run`
  pass after the flip, confirm zero mutations + `baseline_shadow_check` still emits, and record the workflow run-id.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] [CODE] `reconciler.baseline_consumer_swap` flag added; `_local_matches_prev` reads `BindingStore.get_baseline` behind it; ADR-0026 arbitration preserved byte-for-byte.
- [ ] [CODE] RED-first direction-preservation property test (swapped consumer, five fields) RED before, GREEN after.
- [ ] [CODE] `decision_census` canonical key reconciled with `binding_walk_census`; classifier-vs-legacy divergence alert emitted every pass in every mode with the fields above.
- [ ] [OPERATIONAL] >=10 consecutive clean shadow passes observed (streak reset rule above) before the flip; evidence recorded.
- [ ] [OPERATIONAL] Capped live heal done with a pre-heal Jira backup + documented restore; any test artifacts cleaned in both systems.
- [ ] [OPERATIONAL] Consumer flag flipped in prod only after both gates; rollback rehearsed (dry-run run-id recorded).
